dataList.dlg: Hehe, haven't I warned you already? Jump as it might, a flea can't escape the hand closing over it~

I still have a whole list of runaway Nobis to catch... Mmh. Ah, I can't do this anymore. I'm too sleepy after hunting them all night.
Why don't we resume the hunt around... *yawn* ... around noon?

I don't know... We still have some time before we have to leave. How about we stop by a jumak for a quick meal? We'll be running ourselves ragged till sundown once we head out, best we do that on a full belly~
Excuse me, good ma'am~! Two bowls of hot gukbap over here, please~
Look how the moon hangs so bright in the sky, its light leaving no corner covered by shadows in these alleyways. Hide if you want~ run if you must~ But I'll still find you and drag you back.

"When bone cleaves to flesh as flesh to bone, tears of blood shall flood the streets." Quite an apt turn of phrase, isn't it?
With the Court Circles of Sal and Ppyeo colluding, poor Pi's always bleeding like a stuck pig~
That makes it a good hunting season for us Ch'unokkuns. You run away, we catch you, you run away again, we catch you again... Why, I suppose we have you to thank for fattening our bottom line!

Did you hear? The word on the street is that some scientists in the "Pi (Blood)" faction have been slipping away one after another to T Corp.
Fuhu, I wonder why they're so intent on leaving when life'll be just as grueling there as it is here? "Anywhere's better than here," they must've told themselves... Few hopes are more hollow than that, wouldn't you agree?

If you want to find work as a Ch'unokkun, this Scouring Hunterband is a must-have. Just draw it down over your eyes, and you can see clear as day even at night. You can even get directions along the road, too... and, with the proper authorization, you get to take a little peek at the S Corp. residents' identifications, too~

I understand—it's a bit of a hassle to move around after having your flesh and tendons ripped out with a sawblade... but for the tenth time, I'm not going to kill you.
I would've used the other side of the blade to chop your head clean off if I wanted to~ But, hmm~ I'm not about to grant you such an easy way out. So why don't we hurry along nice and easy, hm?

I don't know which Court Circle you were a part of, but if they felt it was necessary to Brand you, you must've been a big deal!
They don't burn Brands into just anyone for committing a crime, after all. Either you're indispensable to S Corp., or committed high treason, or perhaps... Hm, maybe you're an excellent Mugwan whose strength had to be pressed down and kept in check?
... You weren't thinking of running away, were you?
All right, be a nice Nobi and come on out, so I can tie you up like the convict that you are! Let's not keep my Scarlet Bonds waiting, okay?
If you've called for me... Aha. A runaway Nobi to hunt, yes?
Time to hunt down the goods for their masters~
Oops. Careful, please! I almost mistook you for a Nobi and tied you up on the spot~
Round them up by the ropeful!
If you so dread being taken back...
Khh...
... Let me bring back your head, at least!
... To think that the hunter... would be hunted instead... Gah...!
You're bound to pick up all sorts of useful little tricks when you chase people for a living~
Well... It's fine! This wasn't a Nobi hunt anyway.

A few managed to wriggle loose, yes... But there's no shortage of Nobis to chase and catch, is there? There are foolish commonfolk scaling the walls to flee into the other Districts even as we speak.
Let's not get too high or low over this one chase. We'll cast the Bonds better next time!
We've rounded up the last of the Nobi on the wanted writ... Picked up a few Branded ones, too, so that's a bonus... Haha, perhaps we should treat ourselves to a modest little feast of meat and wine?

Oh, my... There they go, scattering like beans again. Hmm... We can't afford to waste too much time in a District controlled by another Wing. Shall we withdraw before the venture turns sour?
As for the Nobis who have escaped here... Well, other Ch'unokkuns should come hunting for them if they're slaves worth their rope.
